package rulecoverage

func NegativeEmptyInterfaceParameterOveruse() string {
    ruleID := "empty_interface_parameter_overuse"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "exported functions with `any` or `interface{}` parameters when concrete types would suffice"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
